name: Fibonacci
description: Pullback model that trades with the base trend once the normalized pullback reaches the opposite side without repeating the same spike recently.

trigger: Long when the base trend is up, the pullback oscillator is in the down zone, and there has not been another downside spike recently.
Short when the base trend is down, the pullback oscillator is in the up zone, and there has not been another upside spike recently.

earlyExit: Long exit when price has already made the upside impulse that ends the pullback trade.
Short exit when price has already made the downside impulse that ends the pullback trade.

checks.label: The pullback oscillator is in the down zone
There has not been another downside spike recently
The pullback oscillator is in the up zone
There has not been another upside spike recently
Price has already made the upside impulse that ends the trade
Price has already made the downside impulse that ends the trade
